label.moreTools: +{{count}} more tools — all available to configure after creation

status.noActivity: No activity in the last hour
status.requestsSucceeded: All {{count}} requests succeeded in the last hour
status.errorRate: {{rate}}% error rate in the last hour ({{count}} requests)

hint.serverNameHelper: A short name that identifies this integration
hint.descriptionHelper: Optional — helps team members understand this server's purpose
hint.tagsHelper: Optional — used to filter and organize servers
hint.tagsPlaceholder: Press Enter or comma to add…
hint.baseUrlOverrideHint: Leave blank to use the URL declared in the spec.
hint.baseUrlCollectionHint: Override the base URL from the collection. Leave blank to use the collection URL.
hint.baseUrlApiHint: The root address of the external API.
hint.specNameHint: The server name will be taken from the spec's info.title. You can rename it after creation.
hint.toolsEditableHint: Tool parameters, descriptions, and output schemas are editable from the server detail page after creation.
hint.mcpKeysHint: MCP API keys and rate limiting are available in the server settings after creation.
hint.credentialsHint: Use tokens with minimum required scope. Credentials are stored in the database.
hint.readOnlyWarning: Use a read-only user with access limited to only the tables the AI needs.
hint.mongoReadOnlyWarning: Use an account scoped to only the collections the AI needs.
hint.dynamoIamHint: Prefer an IAM user with least-privilege permissions — read-only access to specific tables.
hint.firestoreRoleHint: Create a service account with Cloud Datastore User role (read-only) for minimal permissions.
hint.invalidUrl: Invalid URL — include the protocol (e.g. https://api.example.com)
hint.dragOpenApi: Drag your OpenAPI / Swagger spec here
hint.skipToEmpty: Optional — skip to start with an empty server
hint.toolsAutoGenerated: Tools will be generated automatically from this spec
hint.postmanImported: Postman collection will be imported as MCP tools
hint.dragPostman: Drag your Postman Collection v2 here
hint.discovered: Discovered {{count}} tools from the spec at this URL.
hint.emptyServerHint: The server will be created empty. Add tools manually from the server detail page.
hint.configureUrl: Configure this URL in Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any compatible MCP client.
hint.authHeaderRequired: This server requires authentication — send the header auth: <your-key>
hint.scanQr: Scan with a mobile device to transfer the URL
hint.noAuthRequired: No authentication required — ready to use immediately.

empty.noActivityYet: No activity yet — your AI hasn't run any tasks in this period.
empty.noActivityPeriod: No activity yet in this period.

confirm.deleteMessage: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

error.forbidden: You don't have permission to view servers.
error.forbiddenCreate: You don't have permission to create servers.
error.forbiddenDashboard: You don't have permission to view the dashboard.
error.loadDashboard: Failed to load the dashboard. Please refresh the page.
error.noSpecFound: No spec found at this URL. Try uploading the file manually.
error.createTemplateError: Something went wrong creating the server.
error.linkExpired: This link is invalid or has expired.

source.chooseSourceHint: Select the type of API or database this server will connect to.

auth.credentialsHint: Credentials attached to every outgoing request. Never exposed to the AI.
auth.grpcCredentialsHint: Credentials sent as metadata headers with every gRPC call. Never exposed to the AI.
auth.noCredentials: No credentials attached. Use for public APIs.
auth.oauthFlow: Uses client_credentials flow. Token renewed automatically.
auth.customHeadersHint: Add HTTP headers to every request (e.g. X-Tenant-Id).
auth.comingSoon: Full {{type}} execution support is coming soon. The server configuration will be saved and activated when the adapter is released.

template.preconfiguredHint: Start with a pre-built integration. Pick a template, name your server, and your AI will have working tools in under a minute.
template.noAuthReady: No authentication required — ready to use immediately.

docs.authWarning: This server requires authentication — send the header auth: <your-key>
docs.configureUrl: Configure this URL in Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any compatible MCP client.

share.title: MCP Server URL
share.urlDescription: This is the address you'll paste into your AI client's MCP configuration.
share.claudeDesktopHint: Edit the file ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) or %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json (Windows) and add:
share.cursorHint: Open Settings → Features → MCP Servers and click Add new MCP server. Choose HTTP transport, paste the URL below and save.
share.anyClientHint: Point your client to this URL using Streamable HTTP transport.
share.anyClientAuthHint: Include the header auth: <your-api-key> in every request.
share.requiresKey: This server requires an API key. Contact the person who shared this link to obtain your personal key.
share.poweredBy: Powered by MCP Convert · This page is publicly accessible via the share link.

upload.dragHint: Drag your Swagger / OpenAPI file here
